title: Build the same-device Clone operation journal and state machine
objective: Implement the original approved minimal Clone Journal and operation state machine without mixing it with Demo Sandbox persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Retain same-device and same-browser recovery only, with no cross-device claim.
Persist only the approved minimal fields and never the transformed trip or Sandbox payload.
Apply seven-day expiry, schema/template validation, ID validation, fingerprint validation, and untrusted-input handling.
Share one in-flight operation for double-click and reuse operation identity across retry and reload.
Never automatically write from an expired, corrupted, stale, or incompatible Journal.
Use fingerprint only for consistency, never authorization.
Keep Clone Journal storage keys and behavior separate from Demo Sandbox storage and Reset.
